workflow_templates.read: auth != null && (get('database.users.' + auth.openid + '.role') == 'admin' || get('database.users.' + auth.openid + '.isAdmin') == true)
workflow_templates.write: auth != null && (get('database.users.' + auth.openid + '.role') == 'admin' || get('database.users.' + auth.openid + '.isAdmin') == true)

workflow_tasks.read: auth != null && (resource.approverId == auth.openid || resource.orderId in get('database.work_orders.' + auth.openid))

workflow_logs.read: auth != null && (resource.orderId in get('database.work_orders.' + auth.openid) || get('database.users.' + auth.openid + '.isAdmin') == true)
